quoted.text:
Netanyahu RUSHED to Jerusalem HOSPITAL

His office only confirmed the transfer AFTER Hebrew-language media broke the story and forced their hand.

Netanyahu was taken to Hadassah Ein Kerem Medical Center on Monday evening. The nature of the treatment was not disclosed, with aides offering only a vague reference to dental work.

This is the same hospital where he secretly underwent radiation for a malignant prostate tumor last month without informing the public, a fact he only admitted after it leaked.

The pattern is clear: this government lies about his health until it can't.

posts.author: Anthony Smith
posts.content: Walk around the outside and see where it is coming from. Normally one side is the strongest, then look for towers. If no towers on that side close by good chance it is the neighbors WiFi. In single story buildings shielding the fence with wire mesh (metal window screen) can be a quick easy fix.
